headline: Here’s What Truist Thinks About Capital One Financial Corporation (COF)
summary: ​Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is one of the Best Stocks to Buy Before the Next Bull Run . The stock has declined more than 22% on a year-to-date basis, but Wall Street expects more than 34% upside from the current level. ​Recently, on April 23, Truist analyst Brian Foran lowered the firm’s price target […]

headline: Walmart, Target, and Costco make key self-checkout changes
summary: Checking out from a grocery store used to be a relatively simple thing. You waited in line, then a person scanned your items, you paid — maybe even by writing a check — and then went on your way. Some stores had 10-items-or-less lines, and the closest thing to a checkout controversy would be when ...
